relics.name: Remarkably Throwable Rock
relics.description: Your first oceanwielder:Hit and oceanwielder:Guard each combat are repeated.
relics.flavorText: Ain't no better feeling than smashing a window or two.

relics.name: Grav-Shoes
relics.description: Whenever you lose HP from oceanwielder:Weight, lose 2 less.
relics.flavorText: Not quite suited for a set of paws, but they'll do.

relics.name: Okebaka
relics.description: The first time you oceanwielder:Guard each combat, gain 8 oceanwielder:Aegis.

relics.name: Stamp
relics.description: Upon pickup, permanently Stamp 4 random cards in your deck.
relics.flavorText: The Royals' seal. This one's a counterfeit, of course.

relics.name: Punchcard
relics.description: Every 8th time you oceanwielder:Hit or oceanwielder:Guard, gain [oceanwielder:TixIcon] .

relics.name: Ruby
relics.description: At the end of every 2nd turn, oceanwielder:Guard.
relics.flavorText: An impeccable cutting tool. The greatest invention leading up to sliced bread.

relics.name: Carved Stone
relics.description:
Replaces Remarkably Throwable Rock.
Whenever you play a card, gain 1 Vigor and oceanwielder:Aegis.
relics.flavorText: ...or three, or four... Hell, you could smash anything with this!

relics.name: Envelope
relics.description: oceanwielder:Moxie triggers at 4 stacks rather than 5.
relics.flavorText: Correspondence is a much better read when it isn't addressed to you.

relics.name: Whole Ahh Shed
relics.flavorText: Miniaturisation technology can't come soon enough.

relics.name: Totem with a Top Hat
relics.description:
[oceanwielder:TixIcon] no longer draw cards and now grant [E] .
Moxie no longer grants [E] and now draws cards.
relics.flavorText: You're fairly certain it wasn't made this way, but you don't have the heart to take away its hat, it looks too content.

potions.name: Substitute
potions.description: Wield a random weapon and a random shield.

keywords.name: Aegis
keywords.description: Increases the Block of your next Guard.

keywords.name: Buckler
keywords.description:
The default shield.
Guard: Gain 5 block.
Dequip: Gain 7 Block.

keywords.name: Chainsaw
keywords.description:
Weapon.
Hit: Deal 2x3 damage.
Dequip: Gain 2 Strength.

keywords.name: Crossbow
keywords.description:
Weapon.
Hit: Deal 9 damage.
Dequip: Gain Block equal to Crossbow's current damage.
Whenever you play a card, Crossbow's damage increases by the number of Stamps on it.

keywords.name: Cutlass
keywords.description:
The default weapon.
Hit: Deal 6 damage.
Dequip: Deal 9 damage to a random enemy.

keywords.name: Emeici
keywords.description:
Weapon.
Hit: Deal 3x2 damage.
Dequip: Gain 6 Vigor.

keywords.name: Hammer
keywords.description:
Weapon.
Hit: Deal 6 damage and increase dequip damage by 2.
Dequip: Deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.

keywords.name: Heater
keywords.description:
Shield.
Guard: Gain 2x2 Block.
Dequip: Gain 6 Aegis.

keywords.name: Hologram
keywords.description:
Shield.
Guard: Gain 4 Block. Gain 3 Block next turn.
Dequip: Gain 2 Tix.

keywords.name: Kite
keywords.description:
Shield.
Guard: Gain 6 Block. Gain 2 Vigor.
Dequip: Gain 2 Strength.

keywords.name: [oceanwielder:StampIcon] Stamp
keywords.description: Playing stamped cards grants Moxie. When you reach 5 Moxie, gain [E] .

keywords.name: Scythe
keywords.description:
Weapon.
Hit: Deal 5 damage and gain 3 Block.
Dequip: ALL enemies lose 1 Strength.

keywords.name: Throwing Star
keywords.description:
Weapon.
Hit: Deal 7 damage.
Dequip: Apply 2 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

keywords.name: [oceanwielder:TixIcon] Tix
keywords.description: May be spent at any point in combat to draw cards.

keywords.name: Weight
keywords.description: If you end your turn while bearing 3 or more Weight, lose 6 HP and all Weight.

keywords.name: Wield
keywords.description: Trigger the Dequip effect of your current weapon or shield, then replace it with a new one.

mods.name: Wielder (The)
mods.description: A character mod with no direct damage or block numbers.
